allow: Bash(node -e "import\('./server/db.js'\).then\(m => { const db = m.openDatabase\(\); console.log\('OK, table count:', db.prepare\(\\"SELECT COUNT\(*\) as n FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\).get\(\).n\); console.log\('migrations:', db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM migrations'\).all\(\)\); db.close\(\); }\).catch\(e => console.error\('FAIL:', e.message\)\)")
